message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' version: 1.20201106
' Skins: https://plantuml.com/skin-parameters
' UML Class Diagrams: https://plantuml.com/class-diagram

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

class Brain {
    C
    pythons = []
    pips = []
    python_default
    python2_default
    python3_default
    pip_default
    pip2_default
    pip3_default
    visualisation = "
    verbose = true
    report_obj = {}
    sites = {}
}

class Base {
    C
    path = path
    paths_all = Set
    is_default = false
    is_default2 = false
    is_default3 = false
    result_shell_ls
    result_shell_version
    result_shell_file_size
    version
    size
    warnings = []
    report_obj = {}
    ---
    get exists()
    analyse()
    report()
}

class Python {
    C
    result_shell_site_info
    result_shell_run_pip_as_module
    sys_path = []
    pip_module_version
    pip_module_site_package_path
    pips = []
    ---
    analyse()
}

class Pip {
    C
    site_package_path
    pythons = []
    ---
    analyse()
    analyse_version()
    report()
}

class Site {
    C
    path = path
    pythons = Set
    pips = Set
}

Brain --* Python : pythons
Brain --* Pip : pips *
Brain --* Site : sites
Python --|> Base
Pip --|> Base

note top of Brain
  Brain's attributes
  python_default, python2_default, python3_default
  pip_default, pip2_default, pip3_default
  get stored into the Brain's report objects'
  defaults = {}
  defaults.python
  defaults.python2
  defaults.python3
  defaults.pip
  defaults.pip2
  defaults.pip3
  attributes, respectively.
end note

@enduml
```
